surfaces.description: Machine-readable tap distribution index and upstream release evidence binding.
Homebrew formula projected from the tap manifest and upstream release passport.
Prepared cask publication surface for materializing Kungfu GUI App release passports into Homebrew casks.
Accepted Buildchain @v2 runtime contract for CI lifecycle checks.
Local and CI verification commands that reject formula, evidence, KFD, and workflow drift.
Managed product updater that projects upstream release passports into Homebrew formulae, casks, manifest, and Buildchain runtime lock updates.
Tap-local KFD-1/2/3 claim and witness files consumed by tap verification.
